pix.generated_desc: Complete the payment to unlock your access immediately.
pix.scan_qr: Scan the QR Code below in your banking app:
pix.approval_hint: After payment, approval happens shortly and you will receive access details at {{email}}.

steps.scan_or_copy: Select Scan QR Code or Pix Copy and Paste.
steps.confirm: Check the details and confirm the payment.

thank_you.title: Payment confirmed!
thank_you.subtitle: Your purchase was completed successfully. You will receive access details by email shortly.
thank_you.check_email_desc: We sent the access link and invoice to {{email}}.
thank_you.track_order_desc: You can check the status of your purchase at any time.
thank_you.deliverable_ready: Your material is available for immediate access.
thank_you.delivery_pending_desc: Your payment was approved, but this product does not have automatic delivery configured yet. Check your email or contact support.

upsell.not_immediate_error: This payment method does not support an immediate offer safely yet.
upsell.reserved_desc: Your main order is already confirmed. Scan the QR code below only to complete payment for the additional item.
upsell.default_subtitle: Your main order is already confirmed. If you want, add this item to the end of your purchase.
upsell.main_order_confirmed_desc: Your previous purchase is already secured. This offer is optional and does not replace the order you just paid for.
upsell.saved_method_mode_desc: We recognized the {{method}} used in the main order. The gateway may still request an additional confirmation before completing this item.
upsell.one_click_mode_desc: We identified an eligible reusable method. If you accept, the system will try to add this item with the lowest possible friction.
upsell.not_immediate_mode_desc: This method will not be offered immediately to avoid confusion or perceived duplicate charging after the main order.
upsell.pix_mode_desc: Your main order is already confirmed. If you accept this offer, we will generate a new Pix code only for the additional item.
upsell.card_mode_desc: Your main order is already confirmed. To add this item, confirm a new payment only for the additional item.
upsell.accept_default: Yes, add this to my order
upsell.generate_pix_cta: Generate Pix for the additional item
upsell.decline: No, thanks. I will miss this opportunity.
upsell.order_safe_notice: Your main order will remain confirmed even if you decline this offer.
upsell.card_form_notice: You are confirming an additional payment only for this offer. The main order will not be charged again.

checkout.payment_process_error: We could not process your payment.
checkout.upgrade_expired: This upgrade link has expired. Generate a new upgrade from the portal or installation.
checkout.upgrade_consumed: This upgrade link has already been used. Open a new upgrade to continue.
checkout.upgrade_not_found: This upgrade link was not found or is no longer available.
checkout.upgrade_invalid_context: This upgrade context is not valid to continue.
checkout.validating_upgrade_account: Validating which account should receive this upgrade...
checkout.upgrade_applies_to: This upgrade will be applied automatically to:
checkout.gateway_init_error: The payment gateway was not initialized correctly.
checkout.card_expiry_required: Please enter the card expiration date (MM/YY).
checkout.transaction_declined: Transaction declined. Check the card details.
checkout.payment_error_retry: Error processing payment. Check your details and try again.
checkout.wallet_hint: Review any extra items below if desired and complete your purchase by tapping the {{wallet}} button at the bottom of the page.
checkout.stripe_link_hint: Express payment with 1-Click on the Stripe network
checkout.bump_accept_prefix: Yes, I want to get it for only
checkout.legal_prefix: I understand that the payment will be processed on behalf of the seller
checkout.legal_privacy_prefix: confirm that I have read and understood the
checkout.wallets_localhost_only: Wallets shown only for visual validation on localhost.

validation.full_name: Enter your full name (at least 2 words)
